title: Checker Verdict
description: Output of a checking agent (Devil's Advocate, Evidence-Verifier). Making the checkers' judgments structured means they can themselves be evaluated and human-audited — the checkers are no longer un-checked.

validity_threat.description: For weak/unsupported: name the specific threat (small sample, confirmation bias, causal overreach, unrepresentative, etc.).

rationale.description: Why this verdict — must cite transcript context, not vibes.

human_audit.description: Sampled human check of the checker's call. 'disagree' feeds the learning loop to recalibrate the checker.
